# DRENCH

> DRENCH — a cinematic-commerce storefront for the DRENCH Mark I, a premium electric tactical water blaster
> (drum-fed, pressure-rated, field-tested). Dark tactical register, hot-orange muzzle-glow accent. An original
> fictional brand; no real transaction.

## Pages
- [DRENCH](https://magosp.github.io/studio-showcase/drench/): the DRENCH Mark I electric tactical water blaster — DEPLOY for CAD 129.00.
  Specs, product configurator, interactive cart, illustrative checkout.
